'''Yumfla''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Susevfi]]. It was a large seaport and contained a [[Leonia Tavira's palace|fortress]] built by an [[Unidentified Imperial governor (Suarbi system)|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] and later used by [[Leonia Tavira]]. It also was close to a secret [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]] refuge.

==Appearances==
